description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult female pedestrian, depicted in a neutral standing pose with arms extended horizontally. She is dressed in a short-sleeved, loose-fitting top and matching pants, both featuring a subtle pattern, resembling comfortable loungewear or hospital attire. Her footwear consists of simple, closed shoes, and her hair is long, straight, and parted to one side, cascading down her back. The figure's facial features are softly modeled, and her overall build is slender and proportionate. The clothing fits loosely, with no visible accessories or carried items. The model is designed to blend into urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or hospital grounds.
description: A slender adult female in loose, patterned attire and simple shoes, standing with arms outstretched. She has long, straight hair and a neutral, approachable appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, chest, and the outstretched arms, with the clothing and shoes clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the length and flow of the hair, and the straight alignment of the body and limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the full length of the hair, and the back of the clothing and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the straight posture, with hair and clothing details visible from the side.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved loose top and matching pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair parted to one side
